def solve(nums: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    nums.sort()
    n = len(nums)
    max_len = 1
    for i in range(n):
        target = nums[i] * k
        j = bisect.bisect_right(nums, target) - 1
        current_len = j - i + 1
        if current_len > max_len:
            max_len = current_len
    return n - max_len

def solve(nums, k)
    nums.sort!
    n = nums.length
    max_len = 1
    for i in 0...n
        target = nums[i] * k
        low = i
        high = n - 1
        res = i
        while low <= high
            mid = (low + high) / 2
            if nums[mid] <= target
                res = mid
                low = mid + 1
            else
                high = mid - 1
            end
        end
        current_len = res - i + 1
        max_len = current_len if current_len > max_len
    end
    n - max_len
end
```

import bisect

def solve(nums: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    nums.sort()
    n = len(nums)
    max_len = 1
    for i in range(n):
        target = nums[i] * k
        j = bisect.bisect_right(nums, target) - 1
        current_len = j - i + 1
        if current_len > max_len:
            max_len = current_len
    return n - max_len
